Rules.InvariantScript:
AddColumns(
    GroupBy(
        Filter(expensesWithDepartment, Department = "Finance"),
        CategoryText,
        GroupedData
    ),
    TotalAmountText,
    "£" & Text(Sum(GroupedData, Amount), "#,##0.00")
)

AddColumns(
    GroupBy(
        Filter(expensesWithDepartment, Department = "Dev"),
        CategoryText,
        GroupedData
    ),
    TotalAmountText,
    "£" & Text(Sum(GroupedData, Amount), "#,##0.00")
)

AddColumns(
    GroupBy(
        Filter(expensesWithDepartment, Department = "HR"),
        CategoryText,
        GroupedData
    ),
    TotalAmountText,
    "£" & Text(Sum(GroupedData, Amount), "#,##0.00")
)
